name: Multiple Failed API Requests From Same Source IP (AWS)
notes: This rule triggers when at least 10 failed API requests have been initiated from the same Source IP in two minutes.
bb_references: BB: AWS Cloud: API Request Has Been Denied
BB: AWS Cloud: API Request Has Been Denied match at least 10 times with the same Source IP in 2 minutes
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Amazon AWS CloudTrail
when BB: AWS Cloud: API Request Has Been Denied match at least 10 times with the same Source IP in 2 minutes
thresholds: when BB: AWS Cloud: API Request Has Been Denied match at least 10 times with the same Source IP in 2 minutes
